case_title: CASAS CONCRETE MIXERS INC. et al VS PACIFIC CEMENT CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO CASAS CONCRETE MIXERS, INC.--RETURNED NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
DEFT RONALDO RAMIREZ WAS CHANGED IN OPEN COURT TO REYNALDO W. NUNEZ.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASAS CONCRETE MIXERS INC. CASAS, TOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC CEMENT CORP. NUNEZ, REYNALDO W.
